name: Sydney Local Camp 2026
themeVerseText: I have been crucified with Christ and I no longer live, but Christ lives in me. The life I now live in the body, I live by faith in the Son of God, who loved me and gave himself for me.
locationName: Great Aussie Bush Camp, Lake Macquarie
address: WEC Camp, 30 Nentoura Rd, Morisset NSW 2264
